testcase.name: test_get_listings

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'listings' in [{'category': 'electronics', 'condition': 'used', 'created_at': '2026-01-10T05:47:04.558560+00:00', 'description': 'Created via AI Listing Creator test', ...}, {'category': 'electronics', 'condition': 'used', 'created_at': '2026-01-10T05:45:42.317859+00:00', 'description': 'Created via AI Listing Creator test', ...}, {'category': 'electronics', 'condition': 'new', 'created_at': '2026-01-08T08:36:47.662430+00:00', 'description': 'This is a test listing created by automated testing', ...}, {'category': 'electronics', 'condition': 'like_new', 'created_at': '2026-01-06T17:33:00.851913+00:00', 'description': 'Like new condition', ...}, {'category': 'electronics', 'condition': 'new', 'created_at': '2026-01-06T17:28:28.294077+00:00', 'description': 'This is a test listing created by automated testing', ...}]

testcase.failure: tests/test_mobile_api_iteration30.py:349: in test_get_listings assert "listings" in data E AssertionError: assert 'listings' in [{'category': 'electronics', 'condition': 'used', 'created_at': '2026-01-10T05:47:04.558560+00:00', 'description': 'Created via AI Listing Creator test', ...}, {'category': 'electronics', 'condition': 'used', 'created_at': '2026-01-10T05:45:42.317859+00:00', 'description': 'Created via AI Listing Creator test', ...}, {'category': 'electronics', 'condition': 'new', 'created_at': '2026-01-08T08:36:47.662430+00:00', 'description': 'This is a test listing created by automated testing', ...}, {'category': 'electronics', 'condition': 'like_new', 'created_at': '2026-01-06T17:33:00.851913+00:00', 'description': 'Like new condition', ...}, {'category': 'electronics', 'condition': 'new', 'created_at': '2026-01-06T17:28:28.294077+00:00', 'description': 'This is a test listing created by automated testing', ...}]

testcase.name: test_get_my_listings_authenticated
testcase.failure: tests/test_mobile_api_iteration30.py:369: in test_get_my_listings_authenticated assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
